message:
fix(runtime): defer list-max-listpack-size application in CONFIG SET and clean up subscribe error message

lib.rs — CONFIG SET list-max-listpack-size deferred application:
  Similar to the keyspace-events fix in the previous commit, the
  list-max-listpack-size parameter was being applied immediately during
  CONFIG SET parsing rather than after all parameters are validated.
  Introduced `next_list_max_listpack_size: Option<i64>` to hold the
  parsed value, which is then applied in the post-validation block
  alongside other deferred parameters. This ensures atomicity of
  multi-parameter CONFIG SET calls — if any later parameter fails
  validation, list-max-listpack-size is not prematurely changed.

lib.rs — subscribe error inside MULTI simplified:
  Removed the unused `cmd_str` variable extraction in the subscribe-
  family rejection path inside MULTI. The error message is a static
  string ("ERR Command not allowed inside a transaction") that does
  not reference the command name, so the argv lookup was dead code.
  Also switched from `format!()` to `.to_string()` since there are
  no format arguments, avoiding an unnecessary allocation through the
  formatting machinery.

lib.rs — minor formatting adjustments:
  Reformatted the `static_override_updates.push(...)` call for
  notify-keyspace-events to use a single-line style consistent with
  surrounding code.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
